name: Leo Hamel Jewelry & Gold Buyers - Old Town
description_short: Leo Hamel Jewelry & Gold Buyers - Old Town is a credit repair provider based in San Diego, California. Rated 4.9/5 with 215 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Leo Hamel Jewelry & Gold Buyers - Old Town is a credit repair provider serving clients in San Diego, California. With 215 Google reviews and a 4.9/5.0 rating, Leo Hamel Jewelry & Gold Buyers - Old Town has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a pawn shop, diamond buyer, Leo Hamel Jewelry & Gold Buyers - Old Town provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in San Diego, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Leo Hamel Jewelry & Gold Buyers - Old Town operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the San Diego, California area who are considering Leo Hamel Jewelry & Gold Buyers - Old Town should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
